earned_jurisdictions.description: May serve as witnessed support when owner-approved.
May prepare adjudication requests; not live verdict authority.
May draft visible costly summon intent; not live summon.
May draft closure candidate; not grant closure.
May be nominated for future KAG/ToS review path; not promotion.

rank_ladder.description: May participate only in supervised mechanical trials; no special jurisdiction.
Has passed at least one witnessed trial with intact trace; may be considered for low-risk witness support.
Has a reviewed scar request and retention request candidate; not automatically promoted.
Has repeated retained lessons and no unresolved authority breaches; eligible for stronger jurisdiction candidates.
